description: Approved list of governance/security users authorized to own app registrations and enterprise applications. Only users on this list can be designated as owners.

users.justification: Primary security owner for identity governance

process.add_owner: Submit PR to this file with CISO approval and business justification
process.remove_owner: Submit PR with 30-day notice and successor owner identified
process.emergency_access: Break-glass account procedures apply - see runbook

notes: This list should remain small (recommended: 3-8 users) to maintain accountability
All users must have appropriate Entra ID roles (Security Admin, Application Admin, etc.)
Placeholders (service principals) are allowed with justification but count toward owner limits
Regular access reviews of this list are mandatory (quarterly recommended)
Changes to this list require security leadership approval
